name: github_list_org_attestations
description: GET /orgs/{org}/attestations/{subject_digest} — list org-scoped attestations for sha256:… digest. Cursor pagination (after/before from Link). all_pages + max_pages. per_page defaults to 100 when omitted. attestations:read for fine-grained tokens. See GitHub REST org attestations.

predicate_type.description: Optional filter: provenance, sbom, release, or a custom predicate type string (GitHub API).
